form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when sixth (30.59) at this track in a Mix. Will jump from box 1 for the first time. Can hit the frame with the right run.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th on April 8 over 520m at this track behind Gull Wing beaten 9 lengths (30.56) in a Mix. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 6th on April 8 over 520m at this track behind Gull Wing beaten 9 lengths (30.56) in a Mix. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room soon after the start and was checked.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished seventh over 318m at Dubbo, beaten 8 lengths. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished seventh over 318m at Dubbo, beaten 8 lengths. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 520m at this track. Prepared to overlook.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 520m at this track. Prepared to overlook.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels 1st turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when eighth (23.70) at this track in a Grade 5. Will jump from box 5 for the first time. Tough line-up and places prospects appear best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time when eighth (23.70) at this track in a Grade 5. Will jump from box 5 for the first time. Tough line-up and places prospects appear best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels entering the first turn and came together.

form.formComment: Has ability but remains a maiden after 12 starts, the most recent effort a fifth (30.51) over 520m at this track. Looks a key chance this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has ability but remains a maiden after 12 starts, the most recent effort a fifth (30.51) over 520m at this track. Looks a key chance this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on in the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 7th on April 15 over 520m at this track behind Gudrid beaten 8 lengths (30.32) in a Grade 5. Placed two back at this track. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 520m at Nowra. Prefer to watch at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 520m at Nowra. Prefer to watch at this stage.
